message:
chore: update beads issue tracking database after sync

Complete beadization for 9 integration tracks:
- Tracks 6 (SBH), 7 (RCH), 8 (VC): created 18+5+8 impl beads
- Tracks 9 (beads_rust), 10 (viewer_rust), 11 (agent_mail): 16+13+13 impl beads
- Tracks 12 (CASS), 13 (DCG), 14 (UBS): 4+3+3 impl beads
Closed all B1-B5 sub-beads and parent beadization beads.
Also closed P1-P8 for tracks 12, 13, 14.
